creator: dipdill@hotmail.com
text:
I am having the same issue... it fails the update.  I have tried both options and both still fail.  I'm running 11.1 and using portmaster to do the update.  My current version of curl is 7.54.1.

Here is where it ends:

install: DONTSTRIP set - will not strip installed binaries
gmake  install-data-hook
gmake[5]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.55.1'
cd include && gmake install
gmake[6]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.55.1/include'
Making install in curl
gmake[7]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.55.1/include/curl'
../../include/curl/system.h:431:81: warning: Longer than 79 columns (LONGLINE)
       defined(__XTENSA__) || (defined(__SIZEOF_LONG__) && __SIZEOF_LONG__ == 4))
checksrc: 0 errors and 1 warnings
checksrc: 0 errors and 2 warnings suppressed
gmake[7]: *** [Makefile:679: checksrc] Error 5
gmake[7]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.55.1/include/curl'
gmake[6]: *** [Makefile:449: install-recursive] Error 1
gmake[6]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.55.1/include'
gmake[5]: *** [Makefile:1431: install-data-hook] Error 2
gmake[5]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.55.1'
gmake[4]: *** [Makefile:1255: install-data-am] Error 2
gmake[4]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.55.1'
gmake[3]: *** [Makefile:1208: install-am] Error 2
gmake[3]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.55.1'
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:904: install-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.55.1'
*** Error code 2

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/ftp/curl
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/ftp/curl

===>>> make stage failed for ftp/curl
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for ftp/curl failed
===>>> Aborting update
